hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | head -1 | grep -qE '^gh pr create\b' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A pull request was just created. You MUST now run the /review-pr skill to perform both a code review and a README review, then post structured findings as PR comments. Use the PR number from the gh pr create output."}}' || true
